Off Calendar Jan-27-2016 Continued To Mar-29-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Victoria Townsend, Esq. appearing for Defendant. Plaintiff did not appear and was sanctioned $400 for failure to participate in case after Plaintiff filed Notice of Settlement on Sep-09-2015. The CRC 3.1385 Order to Show Cause is re-set to Mar-29-2016 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk KTom. Proceedings not reported. (610)
